title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・光風霽月

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm back in form, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That should be enough to make up for my
embarrassment at the exhibition race.
choice_data_list: That really got to you, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I may not look it, but I have quite the
competitive streak.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want to appear calm and collected in the eyes of
the world, so I make an effort not to let it show.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But when I'm with you... Well, there's no harm in
letting one person see the real me, is there?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. What race do you think would
make the best stage for the revived Emperor to
reinforce her dominance?
choice_data_list: Let's aim for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A fine choice. Equal in prestige to the Big Eight, it
holds the additional distinction of serving as an
international invitational.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Its trophy will make a perfect jewel for the
Emperor's crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then it's settled. The Japan Cup it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way back from the racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hear that there's an excellent teahouse just
ahead. Do you know it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My subordinates in the student council told me
that I had to go if I ever visited Kyoto. What do
you say?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that was a little unclear... I'm asking if
you want to join me on a little diversion.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. Is it really such a shock?
choice_data_list: What about your student council work?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes. I usually head straight to the office after
races, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, the student council is as hectic as ever, but
recently I have carved myself out a little
breathing room.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That is to say, I have revised our workflow. I still
have final say on all decisions, but I've stepped
back somewhat from the direct labor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I have offloaded some responsibility
onto the other members and turned the process
into a more collaborative effort.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In the past, I tried to do everything myself, for better and for worse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But now, I guide the other members as they strive
in their own ways to realize our collective dream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In many ways, it is more taxing than before, both
mentally and physically. Looking after them will
no doubt still strain my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I cannot bring about a world of bliss on my
own. The world is built by everyone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Therefore, everyone has to do their part.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like leaning on others has reduced
Symboli Rudolf's own burden. She seems a lot less
stressed today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But that's enough about that. I'm itching to try
this tea.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've heard it's tea-riffic! ...What do you think?
Was that good?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You seem awfully prickly today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us pay a visit to the teahouse and
enjoy a tea-riff... um, a delightful time in each
other's company.
